triggers.name: Call ended
triggers.description: Triggers when a call with the contact ends.

contact_filter.name: Contact filter
contact_filter.description: ID, email, or list slug that limits which contacts are evaluated.

owner.name: Owner
owner.description: CRM owner ID or email address to restrict the call to.

duration_seconds.name: Minimum duration (seconds)
duration_seconds.description: Only trigger when the call lasted at least this many seconds.

call_direction.name: Call direction
call_direction.description: Accepted values: inbound or outbound. Leave blank to match all calls.

triggers.name: Call started
triggers.description: Triggers when a call with the contact starts.

contact_filter.name: Contact filter
contact_filter.description: ID, email, or list slug that limits which contacts are evaluated.

owner.name: Owner
owner.description: CRM owner ID or email address to restrict the call to.

expected_duration_seconds.name: Expected duration (seconds)
expected_duration_seconds.description: Optional minimum duration threshold for the scheduled call.

call_direction.name: Call direction
call_direction.description: Accepted values: inbound or outbound. Leave blank to match all calls.

triggers.name: Email bounce
triggers.description: Triggers when an email sent to the contact bounces.

contact_email.name: Contact email
contact_email.description: Specific email address to monitor for bounce events.

campaign_name.name: Campaign name
campaign_name.description: Optional campaign identifier to restrict which sends are evaluated.

bounce_type.name: Bounce type
bounce_type.description: Soft, hard, or any. Leave blank to accept every bounce classification.

retry_window_hours.name: Retry window (hours)
retry_window_hours.description: How long to wait before re-triggering for the same email address.

triggers.name: Job ended
triggers.description: Triggers when the contact's current job or position ends.

contact_email.name: Contact email
contact_email.description: Specific contact email to watch for employment changes.

company_name.name: Company name
company_name.description: Company or account name where the contact previously worked.

job_title.name: Job title
job_title.description: Job title (or wildcard) that should match the ended role.

effective_date.name: Effective date
effective_date.description: Date when the employment change became effective.

triggers.name: Job started
triggers.description: Triggers when the contact starts a new job or position.

contact_email.name: Contact email
contact_email.description: Specific contact email to watch for employment changes.

company_name.name: Company name
company_name.description: Company or account name where the contact started working.

job_title.name: Job title
job_title.description: Job title (or wildcard) that should match the new role.

effective_date.name: Effective date
effective_date.description: Date when the employment change became effective.

triggers.name: Property value changed
triggers.description: Triggers when a specified property value on a record changes.

object_type.name: Object type
object_type.description: Record type to monitor (e.g., contact, deal, account).

property_name.name: Property name
property_name.description: API name of the property to evaluate.

comparison_operator.name: Comparison operator
comparison_operator.description: Supported operators: equals, contains, greater_than, less_than.

comparison_value.name: Comparison value
comparison_value.description: Value to compare the property against.

time_window_days.name: Time window (days)
time_window_days.description: Number of days during which repeated changes should be ignored.

triggers.name: Record created
triggers.description: Triggers when a new record is created in your database or CRM.

object_type.name: Object type
object_type.description: Record type to monitor (e.g., lead, deal, ticket).

pipeline.name: Pipeline/stage
pipeline.description: Optional pipeline or stage identifier used for filtering.

owner.name: Owner
owner.description: User or team responsible for the record.

source.name: Source
source.description: Lifecycle source, campaign, or import used when record was created.

triggers.name: Segment membership changed
triggers.description: Triggers when a contact is added to or removed from a segment or list.

segment_name.name: Segment name
segment_name.description: Name or ID of the list, view, or audience segment.

membership_state.name: Membership state
membership_state.description: Expected values: added, removed, or any.

threshold.name: Minimum match threshold
threshold.description: Optional percentage threshold for intent-based segments.

source.name: Source
source.description: Origin of the data powering the segment (form, workflow, import, etc.).

triggers.name: Contact finished viewing a document
triggers.description: Triggers when a contact finishes viewing a tracked document.

document_id.name: Document ID
document_id.description: Internal or public identifier of the tracked document.

minimum_seconds_viewed.name: Minimum seconds viewed
minimum_seconds_viewed.description: Only trigger when the viewer spends at least this amount of time.

share_channel.name: Share channel
share_channel.description: Channel used to distribute the document (email, link, workspace).

triggers.name: Contact viewed a document
triggers.description: Triggers when a contact views a tracked document.

document_id.name: Document ID
document_id.description: Internal or public identifier of the tracked document.

page_threshold.name: Page threshold
page_threshold.description: Minimum number of pages that must be viewed before triggering.

share_channel.name: Share channel
share_channel.description: Channel used to distribute the document (email, link, workspace).

triggers.name: Document shared with contact
triggers.description: Triggers when a document is shared with a contact.

document_id.name: Document ID
document_id.description: Internal or public identifier of the tracked document.

shared_by.name: Shared by
shared_by.description: User or team that shared the document.

share_channel.name: Share channel
share_channel.description: Channel used to distribute the document (email, link, workspace).

triggers.name: Clicked link in marketing email
triggers.description: Triggers when a tracked link is clicked in a marketing email.

link_url.name: Tracked URL
link_url.description: Exact URL or substring of the link that must be clicked.

contact_email.name: Contact email
contact_email.description: Optional contact email to limit the trigger scope.

utm_medium.name: UTM medium
utm_medium.description: Filter clicks based on a matching UTM medium value.

triggers.name: Marketing or sales email bounced
triggers.description: Triggers when a marketing or sales email bounces.

mailbox.name: Mailbox
mailbox.description: Sending mailbox or connected inbox identifier.

bounce_type.name: Bounce type
bounce_type.description: Soft, hard, or any. Leave empty to include all bounce categories.

triggers.name: Marketing or sales email delivered
triggers.description: Triggers when a marketing or sales email is successfully delivered.

mailbox.name: Mailbox
mailbox.description: Sending mailbox or connected inbox identifier.

time_window_minutes.name: Re-fire window (minutes)
time_window_minutes.description: Prevent duplicate triggers within this window.

triggers.name: Marketing or sales email sent
triggers.description: Triggers when a marketing or sales email is sent.

mailbox.name: Mailbox
mailbox.description: Sending mailbox or connected inbox identifier.

recipient_list.name: Recipient list
recipient_list.description: Audience, list, or segment identifier to filter on.

triggers.name: Opened marketing email
triggers.description: Triggers when a marketing email is opened.

mailbox.name: Mailbox
mailbox.description: Sending mailbox or connected inbox identifier.

triggers.name: Replied to marketing email
triggers.description: Triggers when a contact replies to a marketing email.

mailbox.name: Mailbox
mailbox.description: Inbox that should receive the reply.

owner.name: Owner
owner.description: User responsible for following up with the reply.

response_contains.name: Response contains
response_contains.description: Keyword or phrase that must be present in the reply.

triggers.name: Form interaction
triggers.description: Triggers when a contact interacts with a form (for example by starting to fill in fields).

form_id.name: Form ID
form_id.description: Identifier of the form to monitor.

page_url.name: Page URL
page_url.description: Specific page or URL pattern containing the form.

triggers.name: Form submission
triggers.description: Triggers when a contact submits a form.

form_id.name: Form ID
form_id.description: Identifier of the form to monitor.

page_url.name: Page URL
page_url.description: Specific page or URL pattern containing the form.

utm_source.name: UTM source
utm_source.description: Traffic source that must match before triggering.

minimum_score.name: Minimum lead score
minimum_score.description: Only trigger when the submitter's score exceeds this value.

triggers.name: Form view
triggers.description: Triggers when a contact views a page containing a form.

form_id.name: Form ID
form_id.description: Identifier of the form to monitor.

page_url.name: Page URL
page_url.description: Specific page or URL pattern containing the form.

triggers.name: Meeting booked
triggers.description: Triggers when a meeting is booked with a contact.

meeting_type.name: Meeting type
meeting_type.description: Name of the scheduling template or meeting type.

owner.name: Owner
owner.description: User who should receive the meeting booking.

minimum_attendees.name: Minimum attendees
minimum_attendees.description: Minimum attendee count required for this trigger.

booking_link.name: Booking link
booking_link.description: Specific scheduling page or link slug.

triggers.name: Meeting outcome change
triggers.description: Triggers when the outcome or status of a meeting is updated.

meeting_type.name: Meeting type
meeting_type.description: Name of the scheduling template or meeting type.

pipeline_stage.name: Linked pipeline stage
pipeline_stage.description: Deal or opportunity stage that should be updated.

triggers.name: Contact booked meeting through a sequence
triggers.description: Triggers when a contact books a meeting through a sequence.

sequence_id.name: Sequence ID
sequence_id.description: Identifier of the sequence that should be monitored.

owner.name: Sequence owner
owner.description: Rep or mailbox that owns the enrollment.

step_number.name: Step number
step_number.description: Step at which the meeting was booked.

meeting_type.name: Meeting type
meeting_type.description: Name of the meeting template that should count.

triggers.name: Contract enrolled in a sequence
triggers.description: Triggers when a contact is enrolled in a sequence.

sequence_id.name: Sequence ID
sequence_id.description: Identifier of the sequence that should be monitored.

owner.name: Sequence owner
owner.description: Rep or mailbox that owns the enrollment.

starting_step.name: Starting step
starting_step.description: First step that should be used when the contact is enrolled.

triggers.name: Contract unenrolled from a sequence
triggers.description: Triggers when a contact is unenrolled from a sequence.

sequence_id.name: Sequence ID
sequence_id.description: Identifier of the sequence that should be monitored.

owner.name: Sequence owner
owner.description: Rep or mailbox that owns the enrollment.

step_number.name: Last completed step
step_number.description: Step index when the unenrollment happened.

triggers.name: Contact unenrolled from a sequence via a workflow
triggers.description: Triggers when a workflow unenrolls a contact from a sequence.

sequence_id.name: Sequence ID
sequence_id.description: Identifier of the sequence that should be monitored.

owner.name: Sequence owner
owner.description: Rep or mailbox that owns the enrollment.

triggers.name: Contact unenrolled manually from a sequence
triggers.description: Triggers when a contact is manually unenrolled from a sequence.

sequence_id.name: Sequence ID
sequence_id.description: Identifier of the sequence that should be monitored.

owner.name: Sequence owner
owner.description: Rep or mailbox that owns the enrollment.

actor.name: Actor
actor.description: User who performed the manual unenrollment.

triggers.name: Sequence finished
triggers.description: Triggers when a sequence finishes for a contact.

sequence_id.name: Sequence ID
sequence_id.description: Identifier of the sequence that should be monitored.

owner.name: Sequence owner
owner.description: Rep or mailbox that owns the enrollment.

duration_days.name: Duration (days)
duration_days.description: Minimum duration the contact stayed enrolled before finishing.

triggers.name: CTA click
triggers.description: Triggers when a contact clicks a CTA on your website.

cta_id.name: CTA ID
cta_id.description: Identifier or slug of the CTA element.

page_url.name: Page URL
page_url.description: Page or URL pattern where the CTA lives.

minimum_sessions.name: Minimum sessions
minimum_sessions.description: Only fire when the visitor has at least this many sessions.

triggers.name: CTA view
triggers.description: Triggers when a contact views a CTA on your website.

cta_id.name: CTA ID
cta_id.description: Identifier or slug of the CTA element.

page_url.name: Page URL
page_url.description: Page or URL pattern where the CTA lives.

view_threshold.name: Required impressions
view_threshold.description: Number of impressions required before triggering.

triggers.name: Page visited
triggers.description: Triggers when a contact visits a tracked page on your website.

url_pattern.name: URL pattern
url_pattern.description: Exact URL or pattern (regex, wildcard) that must match.

minimum_sessions.name: Minimum sessions
minimum_sessions.description: Only fire when the visitor has at least this many sessions.

triggers.name: Ad interaction
triggers.description: Triggers when a contact interacts with a tracked ad.

creative_id.name: Creative ID
creative_id.description: Version of the ad creative to monitor.

triggers.name: Media play
triggers.description: Triggers when a contact plays a tracked media asset such as a video or audio clip.

campaign_id.name: Campaign ID
campaign_id.description: Marketing campaign associated with the asset.

percent_complete.name: Percent complete
percent_complete.description: Minimum playback percentage before the trigger fires.

triggers.name: Achieved workflow goal
triggers.description: Triggers when a contact achieves the defined goal of a workflow.

workflow_id.name: Workflow ID
workflow_id.description: Identifier of the workflow to monitor.

goal_name.name: Goal name
goal_name.description: Specific goal or conversion to match.

audience_filter.name: Audience filter
audience_filter.description: List, lifecycle stage, or segment to limit goal tracking.

time_window_days.name: Goal window (days)
time_window_days.description: Minimum days before repeat goal completions trigger again.

triggers.name: Enrolled in workflow
triggers.description: Triggers when a contact is enrolled in a workflow.

workflow_id.name: Workflow ID
workflow_id.description: Identifier of the workflow to monitor.

source.name: Enrollment source
source.description: Manual, list, API, form, or any.

starting_step.name: Starting step
starting_step.description: Name or ID of the first step used for enrollment.

triggers.name: Unenrolled from workflow
triggers.description: Triggers when a contact is unenrolled from a workflow.

workflow_id.name: Workflow ID
workflow_id.description: Identifier of the workflow to monitor.

step_name.name: Step name
step_name.description: Workflow step where the unenrollment occurred.

triggers.name: Closed ticket
triggers.description: Triggers when a Freshdesk ticket is closed.

group_id.name: Group ID
group_id.description: Numeric ID of the Freshdesk group handling the ticket.

agent_id.name: Agent ID
agent_id.description: Optional agent assigned to the ticket.

triggers.name: Created ticket
triggers.description: Triggers when a new Freshdesk ticket is created.

group_id.name: Group ID
group_id.description: Numeric ID of the Freshdesk group handling the ticket.

source.name: Source
source.description: Email, phone, portal, social, chat, etc.

tag.name: Tag
tag.description: Ticket tag that must be present.

triggers.name: Received survey
triggers.description: Triggers when a Freshdesk satisfaction survey response is received.

rating_threshold.name: Rating threshold
rating_threshold.description: Minimum or maximum rating that should trigger.

comment_contains.name: Comment contains
comment_contains.description: Keyword or phrase that must appear in the response.

triggers.name: Resolved ticket
triggers.description: Triggers when a Freshdesk ticket is marked as resolved.

group_id.name: Group ID
group_id.description: Numeric ID of the Freshdesk group handling the ticket.

agent_id.name: Agent ID
agent_id.description: Optional agent assigned to the ticket.

resolution_time_hours.name: Resolution time (hours)
resolution_time_hours.description: Maximum time allowed between creation and resolution.

satisfaction_threshold.name: Satisfaction threshold
satisfaction_threshold.description: Minimum CSAT value associated with the ticket.

triggers.name: LinkedIn invitation sent
triggers.description: Triggers when a LinkedIn connection invitation is sent to a prospect.

prospect_profile.name: Prospect profile URL
prospect_profile.description: LinkedIn URL of the prospect profile.

campaign_name.name: Campaign name
campaign_name.description: Outbound campaign or playbook being used.

follow_up_in_days.name: Follow-up in days
follow_up_in_days.description: How many days to wait before the next step if no response.

triggers.name: LinkedIn message received
triggers.description: Triggers when a LinkedIn message is received from a prospect.

prospect_profile.name: Prospect profile URL
prospect_profile.description: LinkedIn URL of the prospect profile.

campaign_name.name: Campaign name
campaign_name.description: Outbound campaign or playbook being used.

message_contains.name: Message contains
message_contains.description: Keyword or phrase that must appear in the inbound message.

triggers.name: LinkedIn message sent
triggers.description: Triggers when a LinkedIn message is sent to a prospect.

prospect_profile.name: Prospect profile URL
prospect_profile.description: LinkedIn URL of the prospect profile.

campaign_name.name: Campaign name
campaign_name.description: Outbound campaign or playbook being used.

message_template.name: Message template
message_template.description: Template or snippet identifier used for the send.

triggers.name: New LinkedIn connection
triggers.description: Triggers when a new LinkedIn connection is created.

prospect_profile.name: Prospect profile URL
prospect_profile.description: LinkedIn URL of the prospect profile.

campaign_name.name: Campaign name
campaign_name.description: Outbound campaign or playbook being used.

connection_source.name: Connection source
connection_source.description: LinkedIn import, automation, manual search, or event.

triggers.name: Bounce
triggers.description: Triggers when a Mailchimp email sent to a contact bounces.

email_address.name: Email address
email_address.description: Specific recipient email to filter on.

triggers.name: Click
triggers.description: Triggers when a tracked link is clicked in a Mailchimp email.

link_url.name: Tracked URL
link_url.description: Exact link that must be clicked.

email_address.name: Email address
email_address.description: Specific recipient email to filter on.

triggers.name: Open
triggers.description: Triggers when a Mailchimp email is opened.

email_address.name: Email address
email_address.description: Specific recipient email to filter on.

triggers.name: Sent
triggers.description: Triggers when a Mailchimp email is sent.

segment_name.name: Segment name
segment_name.description: Audience segment that must be targeted.

send_time.name: Send time
send_time.description: Restrict to sends that happen within this window.
